acceptanceCriteria: CHANGELOG.md has a 0.8.0 - 2026-07-12 section containing the former Unreleased entry and no Unreleased heading remains
no source, schema, workflow, or dist change is included
the recorded required check git diff --check passes; npm run test:all, npm run bench, and claude plugin validate . --strict are rerun and reported in the pull request
rigor release-check passes on the merged main commit before tagging
note: Policy permits transmission; minimize content and re-check destination controls.
